## Testing
<!-- How was this tested? -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Shell scripts use `set -euo pipefail`
- [ ] Variables are quoted (`"$var"`)
- [ ] No hardcoded personal data (emails, tokens, paths)
- [ ] ADR created if this is an architectural change
